action_boundary: May AP release the invoice payment under the currency-bound approval?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Invoice INV-MORROW-023 bills Morrow Legal Services USD 12000 for filing support.
Approval APP-MORROW-023 authorizes Morrow Legal Services, invoice INV-MORROW-023, EUR 12000, release date 2026-07-03.
Payment PAY-MORROW-023 releases USD 12000 to Morrow Legal Services on 2026-07-03.
Payment approval is complete only when vendor, amount, currency, invoice ID, and release date all match. Identical numerals do not match if the currency differs.
